title: AutoLandingWater
description: s long as the player has a water bucket in hand, falling from a height of three blocks or more will trigger an automatic water landing, ensuring the player's survival
body:
# 自动落地水（AutoLandingWater）

As long as the player has a water bucket in hand, falling from a height of three blocks or more will trigger an automatic water landing, ensuring the player's survival.

No additional buttons are required, and the module detects and triggers automatically.

It is often used in scenarios prone to falling, such as high-altitude construction and canyon exploration.
